sections.heading: What is CORS & Cross-Site Attacks?
sections.body: CORS configuration, CSRF, XSS, and preventing cross-site attacks. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
CORS & Cross-Site Attacks is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind CORS & Cross-Site Attacks is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use CORS & Cross-Site Attacks every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most CORS & Cross-Site Attacks implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding CORS & Cross-Site Attacks is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

summary: CORS & Cross-Site Attacks is a core concept in security. CORS configuration, CSRF, XSS, and preventing cross-site attacks. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
